title: SQL: quotes in identifiers
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, tab Boolean);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, tab) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id Int32, description String, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample description');
key_bug_features: Quotes in identifiers cause SQL errors
